text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting ready to go home when I notice Mejiro
Dober doing warm-ups.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I still have something I want to work on. Didn't
quite get it down during practice, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run a bit more. You can go ahead
and go home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Stop giving me that worried look. I know how to
pace myself just fine.
choice_data_list: I'll stay and watch, so give it your all!
I'll stay and watch, so give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: I'll stay and watch, so give it your all!
I'll stay and watch, so give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So it's either you stay and watch or I don't get to
train on my own, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So it's either you stay and watch or I don't get to
train on my own, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sure, whatever. Do what you want. I'll just
pretend you're not here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You must be tired after today, though. You can
be really stubborn sometimes, you know that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Well, if you're going to watch, you might as well
give me some pointers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Well, if you're going to watch, you might as well
give me some pointers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober pushes herself right up until curfew!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling you won't change your mind even
if I tell you I'll be careful...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm still itching to train, but I see where you're coming from, so I'll give in this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Also... just to be clear, it's not like I'm unsatisfied
with your training regimen or anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober takes the time after school to rest
and feels nice and refreshed!
